title: アオハル杯4戦目・次こそみんなで

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I should have done more to help everyone...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This was our last match before the big showdown
with Team Zenith, too...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list: You just have to believe in your team.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right... I'm not in this alone.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... We can do it. Next time, we'll win for sure!
